history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blurry, low-resolution image shows a woman standing or seated indoors with a small circular inset portrait in the upper left and large white text across the bottom.

Main Subject:
The main focus appears to be a person with long dark hair wearing a light-colored top, shown from about the chest up, facing toward the camera with an indistinct, slightly downward gaze. In the upper left corner, there is a circular inset image containing a man wearing a cap and a red face covering or head covering, with his face visible inside the circle.

Setting:
The background looks like an indoor wall or room corner with muted colors. Lighting appears soft and uneven, consistent with a low-quality or compressed screenshot.

Visual Details:
The image has a hazy, pixelated look. The person’s clothing is a light, possibly gray or patterned top. The lower portion contains bold, all-caps white text on top of the background. The circular inset portrait has a white border and overlaps the main image. A small yellow icon with a face-like graphic appears near the right side of the text.

Visible Text:
NGETIK APA SIH CIL 🔥

Practical Summary:
The image shows a blurred indoor scene with a person and an inset circular portrait of another person. Large white text at the bottom reads “NGETIK APA SIH CIL” followed by a flame icon.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
